item.title: YaCy: decentralized search alternative
item.description: Today we are getting more in-depth wit YaCy and why it is important. We, as internet users, need to be mindful of who is using our data and how. Does it benefit us to give up our information and privacy? Convenience is often the only benefit found for today’s mass data collection of internet users. Search engines are a part of this privacy war playing out in front of us. They collect data to sell ads tailored to our search history at a higher price than they could for random ads.
